title: Short-Form Storyboard
description: Machine-readable storyboard for short-form vertical video. Primary output of step-03, primary input for remotion-scaffold.ts.

fps.description: Frames per second (probed from source via ffprobe)

compositionWidth.description: Composition width in pixels (probed from source via ffprobe)

compositionHeight.description: Composition height in pixels (probed from source via ffprobe)

backgroundMusic.description: MUST be 'sf-{NN}-audio-mix.mp3' — the pre-mixed audio file (music at 0.08 + clicks at 6.0). NEVER use raw track filename (bg-*.mp3) — causes deafening music and no clicks.

nonSpeakerCoveragePct.description: Percentage of frames that are non-speaker visual types (must be >= 65%)

durationCategory.description: Video duration category for pacing rule thresholds

segments.description: Ordered list of video segments. Must cover all frames with zero gaps.

startFrame.description: Start frame (0-based). Must equal previous segment's startFrame + durationInFrames.

durationInFrames.description: Duration in frames. Max 120 (4s @ 30fps) per Rule V3.

sourceFile.description: Speaker/MG video filename relative to public/. Null for Tier A inline-rendered segments.

overlayFile.description: MG overlay filename for V5 split-screen segments. Null for non-split-screen.

videoStartFrom.description: Frame offset into source video for speaker segments (audio sync). Equals startFrame for cleaned source.

overlayPadding.description: Whether V5 overlay renders at 85% with light bg margins. Default false.

skipFadeIn.description: Skip the 8-frame fade-in. Must be true for first segment (Rule V7).

captionText.description: Text content for V6 hook-text segments. Null for other patterns.

captionHighlight.description: Word(s) to highlight in accent color for V6 segments.

transitionSfx.description: Transition SFX marker. 'click' when visual-type family changes, '--' otherwise.

notes.description: Freeform notes (tier info, animation description, etc.)

mgRequests.description: Motion graphic requests for asset generation pipeline. Informational — not used by scaffold.

prompt.description: Prompt or description for MG generation

v5Padding.description: DEPRECATED — FFmpeg pre-padding removed. Padding is handled exclusively by Remotion overlayPadding prop (85% with objectFit: contain). This field is ignored by upscale-mgs.ts.

transcriptContext.description: MANDATORY: Exact 5-15 words from the transcript spoken during this MG segment's timeframe. Calculate from startFrame/durationInFrames, find the matching transcript words, and quote them verbatim. Used to verify the MG prompt visually reinforces what the viewer hears. null or N/A is a SYSTEM FAILURE.

visualAnalysisRef.description: Body video timestamp where this tool/concept is visible (e.g., 'body @ 03:12-05:05') or null for abstract MGs.
